case_title: CHASE BANK USA N.A. VS. MITCHELL E CARSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS` FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-26-2010.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-13-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-03-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR THOMAS J. LOSAVIO.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-21-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MITCHELL CARSON'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE IS OFF CALENDAR. MOTION VIOLATES CRC 3.1112 (A) BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE A TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING. FURTHER, DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE AT LEAST 16 COURT DAY NOTICE PER CCP 1005. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Ntc And Motion For Dismissal With Prejudice
Off Calendar Sep-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MITCHELL CARSON'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE is off calendar. Motion violates CRC 3.1112 (a) because defendant failed to provide a time and place of hearing. Further, defendant failed to provide at least 16 court day notice per CCP 1005. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
